title: AuraBoot Plugin Manifest
description: Schema for AuraBoot unified plugin package manifest (plugin.json)

pluginId.description: Unique plugin identifier in reverse domain name format

namespace.description: Resource isolation namespace, unique within tenant

dslVersion.description: DSL schema format version used by this plugin's page definitions (single integer, default 1)

dependencies.description: List of dependent plugins. Supports string format (pluginId only) or object format (pluginId + version range)

provides.description: Capabilities this plugin provides to others

requires.description: Capabilities this plugin requires from other plugins

optional.description: If true, plugin works without this capability

requiredPermissions.description: List of permissions required by this plugin

providedModels.description: List of model codes this plugin will create

providedCommands.description: List of command codes this plugin will register

entryPoint.description: Plugin entry point class name (fully qualified)

url.description: CDN URL for frontend assets (optional, for CDN mode)

components.description: List of frontend components provided by this plugin

type.description: Component type: form-field, page-action, dashboard-widget, sidebar-menu

jarFile.description: Path to the PF4J JAR file relative to package root

entryPoint.description: Fully qualified class name of the plugin entry point

remoteEntry.description: Path to the Module Federation remote entry file

path.description: Module path in the federation config

props.description: Additional props to pass to the component

conflictStrategy.description: How to handle conflicts with existing resources

licenseMode.description: License mode governing how entitlements are managed

plans.description: Available subscription/pricing plans for this plugin

code.description: Unique plan code within this plugin

displayNameZh.description: Chinese display name for the plan

displayNameEn.description: English display name for the plan

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default plan for new installations

trialDays.description: Number of trial days before billing starts

features.description: Entitlement feature flags that can be gated per plan

displayNameZh.description: Chinese display name for the feature

displayNameEn.description: English display name for the feature

dependsOn.description: List of feature keys this feature depends on

planFeatures.description: Mapping of plan codes to arrays of feature keys enabled for that plan

dictDefinition.description: Dictionary definition for enumerated value sets

extension.description: Extension properties (e.g. color for status tags)

dictCode.description: Dictionary code for DICT/ENUM type fields

unique.description: Whether the field value must be unique

refTarget.description: Reference target configuration (for REFERENCE type: targetModel, targetField, relationship, etc.)

tableName.description: Table name for the model (optional, auto-generated if not specified)

isAbstract.description: Whether this model is abstract (cannot be instantiated directly)

extension.description: Extension properties (stored in JSONB). May include: titleField, subtitleField, documentConfig, rules (cross-field validation), etc.

modelCode.description: Model code to bind the field to

required.description: Whether the field is required in this model context

visible.description: Whether the field is visible in UI

defaultValue.description: Default value override for this binding

aliasCode.description: Alias code for this field in the model context

isSystemBinding.description: Whether this is a system binding (cannot be unbound)

commandDefinition.description: Command definition for CRUD and business operations

modelCode.description: Primary model code this command operates on

inputFields.description: Input field codes accepted by this command

targetModels.description: Target models affected by this command

requireIdempotencyKey.description: Whether to require an idempotency key

processKey.description: BPM process key for BPM execution mode

autoSetFields.description: Auto-set fields on execution. Map of fieldCode to {strategy, value?}

value.description: Fixed value when strategy is FIXED_VALUE

sourceField.description: Source field when strategy is COPY_FIELD

sideEffects.description: Side effects executed after the main operation

condition.description: SpEL condition for triggering this side effect

targetModel.description: Target model code for the side effect

targetIdField.description: Field containing the target record ID

fieldMapping.description: Field mappings for the side effect operation

guard.description: SpEL guard expression for this transition rule

toState.description: Target state when guard evaluates to true

fromStates.description: Valid source states for state transitions

toState.description: Target state for simple (non-branching) state transitions

stateField.description: State field name for state transitions

cascadeDelete.description: Cascade delete configuration for child models

childModel.description: Child model code to cascade delete

parentField.description: Foreign key field in child model referencing parent

computedFields.description: Computed fields using SpEL expressions. Map of fieldCode to SpEL expression string

postActions.description: Post-actions executed after main operation (e.g., CREATE_CHILDREN)

targetModel.description: Target model code for the action

childModel.description: Child model code for CREATE_CHILDREN actions

parentField.description: Parent foreign key field in child model

type.description: Validation rule type (e.g., UNIQUE_COMPOSITE, HAS_CHILDREN, REQUIRED)

preconditions.description: Preconditions that must be satisfied before execution

bindingRuleDefinition.description: Binding rule for command UI integration and data mapping

commandCode.description: Command code this rule belongs to (null if embedded in command)

ruleType.description: Rule type: FIELD_MAPPING, EXPRESSION, HANDLER, EVENT, VALIDATION, etc.

handlerClass.description: Handler class for HANDLER rule type

eventType.description: Event type for EVENT rule type

resourceType.description: Resource type: MODEL, PAGE, API, MENU, etc.

resourceCode.description: Resource code this permission applies to

action.description: Action: CREATE, READ, UPDATE, DELETE, EXECUTE, etc.

dataScopeType.description: Data scope type: ALL, OWN, DEPT, CUSTOM, etc.

permissions.description: Permission codes assigned to this role

isDefault.description: Whether this is a default role for new users

isSystem.description: Whether this is a system role (cannot be deleted)

scopeType.description: Scope type: GLOBAL, TENANT, DEPARTMENT, etc.

parentCode.description: Parent menu code (null for top-level menus)

permissionCode.description: Permission code required to see this menu

i18nKey.description: I18n key for the menu name

pageKey.description: Page key for linking to a page defined in pages. Resolved to pagePid during import

modelCode.description: Model code for dynamic CRUD page binding

pageType.description: Page type for dynamic rendering: list, detail, form, dashboard

pageDefinition.description: Page schema definition for DSL-driven UI

pageCategory.description: Page category: MODEL, SYSTEM, CUSTOM, etc.

modelCode.description: Associated model code (for MODEL category pages)

schemaVersion.description: DSL schema format version (single integer, default 1)

isTemplate.description: Whether this is a page template

templateCategory.description: Template category if isTemplate is true

processDefinition.description: BPM process definition for workflow automation

bpmnFile.description: BPMN file path relative to plugin package

bpmnContent.description: Inline BPMN XML content (alternative to bpmnFile)

formBindings.description: Form bindings for user tasks. Key: user task ID, Value: form configuration

modelCode.description: Model code for MODEL form type

pagePid.description: Page PID for PAGE form type

designerJson.description: Designer JSON (React Flow format) as alternative to bpmnFile/bpmnContent

validateSql.description: Whether to validate SQL syntax on import

checkPermissions.description: Whether to check permissions on import
